title: Rename workspace
excerpt: I can’t find a way to rename an existing workspace. Is there a way to do that? The name of the team has changed and we need to be able to have others in the organization find our workspace easily in the dropdown.

posts.author: IGNYC (Inessa Gelman)
posts.cookedHtml: I can’t find a way to rename an existing workspace. Is there a way to do that? The name of the team has changed and we need to be able to have others in the organization find our workspace easily in the dropdown.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @IGNYC,

Welcome to the community

Click on the 3 dots at the top. There is an option to rename the workspace

posts.author: IGNYC (Inessa Gelman)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks @kolaai , it’s grayed out for me. The person who created it is no longer with the company. Is there a way to transfer ownership?

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m don’t really know about that. Maybe the admin can change it or you may have to write to support on how best to go about it
